titleStmt.title: SII 37.58: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 58. (A.R. No. B 370 of 1938-39.) Dēvuni-Cuddapah, Cuddapah Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Front wall of the Veṅkaṭēśa-perumāḷ temple.
This is dated Śaka 1476 (current), Pramādi, Karttika śu. 12, Uthāna-dvādaśi corresponding to 1553 A.D., October 18, Wednesday.

Damaged. It records a grant of land to the god Tiruveṅgaḷanātha of Kaḍapa included in Ghanḍikōṭa-sīma which is situated in Udayagiri-Chāvaḍi, on the occasion of Utthāna-dvādaśi by mahāmaṇḍalēśvara China-Avubhaḷrāja, son of Peda-vōbuḷrāja of the Sōma-vaṁśa, for the supply of six tōmālas, three in the name of the donor himself and the remaining three in his wife's name, and for maintaining Chātupaḍi service to the deity. The land is entrusted to Basuvaya and Saruvaya, sons of Chiṁnā-dāsari. The donor is stated to have received Udayagiri-chāvaḍi as nāyaṅkara from the king. The tōmālas seem to have been offered to the deity through the donor's religious teacher (mā ācharya-śrī-hstamandu).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1476 Agunēṭi pramādīca saṁvatsara kā¨rttika śu 12lu śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīra
pratāpa śrī sadāsivadēva mahārāyalu vijayanagaramaṁdu vajrasiṁhvāsanārūḍuḍai pṛthivi sāṁmrājyaṁ cēnu
cuṁḍaṁgānu Akhilāṁḍakōṭi braṁhāṁḍanāyakulayina dēvadēvōttamulaina kaḍapa śrī tiruveṁgaḷanāthadēvuniki dēvara
dāsānudāsulayina sōmavaṁśōdbhavulayni Ātrēyagōtraṁ Āpastaṁbhasūtra yajuśākhādhyāyulayina śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara naṁdela A
vubhatrājula pautrulayni pedavōbuḷrājugāri putrulayina cina Avubhaḷrājuṁgāru sama¨rppiṁccina bhūdhaṁ¨rma śilāśāsanakramame
ṭlaṁnnanu sadāsivadēvamahārāyalu mākā nāyaṁkarānaku pāliṁccina vudayagiri cāvaḍiki cellē ghaṁḍikōṭa sīmalōni kaḍapagrāma
maṁdu yītadhātithi vudhānadvādaśi puṇyakālamaṁdu mā Ācārya śrīhastamaṁdu svāmiki sama¨rppiṁccina tōmāla kayiṁkaryaṁ nābhārya samē
taṁ ccina Ācārya śrīhastamaṁdu nā ṭēśasvāmiki bōṁdutōmāla
vokaboṁdutōmālanu mā voka tōmālanu vubhayaṁ bōṁdu tōmaĀlalu Ārūṁnnutōḷasitōmālalu svāmiki Avadhariṁcēṭe viri
ninā reṁḍuṁnnumā tōḷaśitōmālalu vubhayaṁ yarālanunnu śrītiruveṁgaḷanāthuṁḍu nityō nācāru samētuṁḍaimaṁ Ā
cārya śrīhastamaṁdu trivācakaṁgānu laṁdulakugānu cātupaḍi ciṁnā dāsarikoḍukulu basuvaya saruvayagārki peṭina mānyeṁ . grāmānaku paḍumaraku nārikēḷālu
tūru¨rpu puṣpāla tōṁṭaku vutaraṁ cēnu cēnu svāmiki tiru tōmāla svāmiki tirutōmālalu yī prakārāna sama¨rppiṁcci
[I]ccenu ganaka Ācaṁdrā¨rkka sthāIgānu tri This line is completely damaged.
Digital edition of SII 37.58 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
